steps.t: The injured farmer can be found at the northern gate of the Rammas. You should kneel and listen to what the injured farmer has to say.
Ingold can be found at the northern gate of the Rammas. You should speak with Ingold.
You should patrol the road north and search for survivors in Talath Anor.
You should patrol the road north and search for survivors in Talath Anor.
The slain body is located on the road in Talath Anor. You should examine the body.
